---
name: Session parent
about: Top-level/epic issue that groups action-item sub-issues from a single /ask advisory session.
title: ""
---

## Summary

One to two sentences describing the overall parent issue. The issue title is entered separately in the GitHub UI when creating the issue — this field is not an automatic title source.

## Session context

Required (by convention — GitHub does not enforce this for markdown-bodied templates).

Designated place to record the advisory/`/ask` session topic, the overall goal that motivated creating this set of issues, and any settled premises shared across all sub-issues (so each sub-issue does not have to repeat them).

## Objective

Required. The single overarching outcome this parent issue tracks — written as a clear "done when …" statement.

## Sub-issues

Required. Link each action-item sub-issue by number. GitHub automatically tracks completion of linked-issue checkboxes and rolls up progress to this parent issue.

- [ ] #
- [ ] #
- [ ] #

## Out of scope

Required. What was explicitly considered and decided against during the advisory session, so future readers understand the bounded scope of this parent issue.

## Progress

Progress is tracked automatically by GitHub via the **Sub-issues** task list above. Close this parent issue when all linked sub-issues are closed or explicitly cancelled.

## Related links

Optional. Files, prior issues, PRs, or docs the advisory session referenced.

-

## Open questions

Optional. Explicit unknowns carried forward from the advisory session that affect the overall parent scope (not sub-issue-specific questions).

-
